items.title: Anshul Kamboj has 'found a plan that works for him' and he's cashing in
items.summary: Though the wickets have been coming in a rush, Ambati Rayudu feels Anshul Kamboj "still needs to improve his slower ball"
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Kimi Antonelli storms to Miami Grand Prix pole as Mercedes rebounds after sprint race stumble
items.summary: Verstappen earned his best starting spot of the season as Red Bull has seemingly improved with its car upgrades.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: ‘We’re hot’: three Australian records set on stunning day at World Athletics Relays

items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
